title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #16 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget what we came here to do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! Straw hat spat in Mama's face and it's ruined our reputation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to put straw hat's head on a pike for the world to see!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna get Kaido- San to like me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TAKE STRAW HAT'S HEAD FIRST! WELL TALK ABOUT ALLIANCES LATER!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare for Battle! Don't let them catch us off guard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is right about where that damned King....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd heard talk of an alliance with the big mom pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Time for you to drop outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The next time you make it up here..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: might look a little diff- feren't.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A huge ship just went flying by.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: first time he's gone at it since the war, I think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You really thought us team- ing up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would let you take down one of the emperors!?

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: And Lemme fill you in. Pirate alliances?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: APAPAPA! And I thought they'd kill you by now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: QUEEN- SAN!! We're supposed to take them alive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But how are we supposed to pull that off!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apoo's attacks only reach where you can hear them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you can hear them, you can't avoid them! Keep an eye out for surprise attacks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: man, there's a ton of the worst generation right here on Onigashima!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could make a name for ourselves if we took them out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, did you know killer ate a bad smile?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It turned him into a pleasure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eat this, and you'll have a chance to save your captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Don't cause a scene, you idiot!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 58 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
